name: Mentor Graphics Corporation
description: Mentor Graphics Corporation was a prominent American multinational corporation specializing in electronic design automation (EDA) software for electrical engineering and electronics. Founded in 1981 and headquartered in Wilsonville, Oregon, the company provided essential tools for designing, simulating, and analyzing complex electronic systems and integrated circuits. Mentor Graphics played a critical role in the global semiconductor and electronics industries by enabling engineers to accelerate product development cycles. In 2017, the company was acquired by Siemens, subsequently operating as a key part of the Siemens Digital Industries Software division, continuing its legacy of innovation in industrial software solutions.
